import React from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import './LandingPage.css'; const LandingPage = () => { const navigate = useNavigate(); const handleExploreThemes = () => { navigate('/k-tabletop'); }; // Instagram reel data with custom thumbnails const instagramReels = [ { id: 'C-5Pb10h-WQ', url: 'https://www.instagram.com/reel/DGxHU5uRHfd/?utm_source=ig_web_copy_link&igsh=dnBhdzg4c2g2ZDY=', thumbnail: '/modal-images/samgak-gimbap.jpg', title: 'Samgak Gimbap', description: 'Quick and easy triangular gimbap' }, { id: 'C93-oOxx_yP', url: 'https://www.instagram.com/p/C93-oOxx_yP/', thumbnail: '/modal-images/potato-salada-sandwich.jpg', title: 'Potato Salad Sandwich', description: 'Creamy potato salad sandwich' }, { id: 'DGxHU5uRHfd', url: 'https://www.instagram.com/reel/DGxHU5uRHfd/', thumbnail: '/modal-images/strawberry-chap-sal-tteok.jpg', title: 'Strawberry Chap-sal-tteok', description: 'Sweet rice cake with strawberries' } ]; const handleInstagramClick = (url) => { window.open(url, '_blank', 'noopener,noreferrer'); }; return (
{/* Hero Section */}

Welcome to Jeena's Kitchen

Discover authentic Korean flavors and immerse yourself in traditional dining experiences. From grandmother's recipes to modern Korean cafe culture, explore the rich culinary heritage of Korea.

{/* Single Custom Image from hero-image folder */}
{/* Social Media Section */}

Follow My Journey

{/* YouTube Videos Grid */}

Watch My Latest Videos

{/* Row 1 */}
{/* Row 2 */}
{/* Instagram Reels with Custom Thumbnails */}

Follow on Instagram

{instagramReels.map((reel, index) => (
handleInstagramClick(reel.url)} >

{reel.title}

{reel.description}

))}
{/* Instagram Follow Button */}
Follow @jeenas.kitchen
); }; export default LandingPage;
